explanations.1: This sets the database server location; 'localhost,1433' means the server is on this computer and listening on port 1433 (the default SQL Server port).
explanations.2: This specifies which database within the server you want to connect to—in this case, a database named 'SampleDB'.
explanations.3: This is the SQL query that will be executed; it retrieves all columns and rows from the Customers table in the database.
